subcodes.first_line: Thy name is well-beloved. God willing, mayest thou attain unto that which befitteth such a name. Thy devotion and attention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمت محبوبست انشاء الله بانچه سزاوار این اسمست فائز باشی اقبال و توجهت و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual transformation, @predictions and prophecies, @knowledge; recognition of God
